abstract: Comprehensive Next.js 15 App Router best practices guide designed for AI agents and LLMs. Contains 35+ rules across 8 categories, prioritized by impact from critical (routing, data fetching, component model) to incremental (security and middleware). Each rule includes detailed explanations, real-world examples with bad and good implementations using React 19 and Next.js 15 features, and specific impact metrics to guide automated refactoring and code generation. Focuses on modern patterns: React Server Components, Server Actions, streaming, Partial Prerendering, and the App Router mental model.

categories.name: Routing & Layout
categories.description: App Router directory conventions, layouts, loading states, and route organization

categories.name: Data Fetching & Caching
categories.description: Server-side data fetching, caching strategies, revalidation, and streaming

categories.name: Server & Client Components
categories.description: React Server Components, Client Components, composition patterns, and serialization

categories.name: Server Actions
categories.description: Data mutations, form integration, validation, and error handling with Server Actions

categories.name: Performance & Optimization
categories.description: Image optimization, font loading, prefetching, dynamic imports, and bundle analysis

categories.name: Metadata & SEO
categories.description: Static and dynamic metadata, Open Graph, sitemap, and robots configuration

categories.name: Error Handling & Loading
categories.description: Error boundaries, not-found pages, Suspense boundaries, and loading states

categories.name: Security & Middleware
categories.description: Middleware for auth, server-only code protection, environment variables, and security headers
